postToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); if [ "$TOOL_NAME" = "multi_replace_string_in_file" ]; then FILE_PATHS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs | fromjson | .replacements[].filePath'); else FILE_PATHS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs | fromjson | .filePath // empty'); fi; for FILE_PATH in $FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.js || "$FILE_PATH" == *.ts || "$FILE_PATH" == *.jsx || "$FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then PRETTIER_CMD='prettier'; if command -v npx &>/dev/null && npx prettier --version &>/dev/null 2>&1; then PRETTIER_CMD='npx prettier'; elif ! command -v prettier &>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; $PRETTIER_CMD --write "$FILE_PATH"; fi; done
